card.name: Ruined Reckoner
card.text: Menace Whenever this creature deals lethal damage to another permanent, if it was a creature, you gain life equal to that creature's toughness. Otherwise, create a Treasure token.

card.name: The Harrowing
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, exile a nontoken creature you control and a creature card from your graveyard. Whenever a creature card enters a graveyard, you may pay life equal to its mana value. If you do, return it to the battlefield under your control. It becomes a Zombie in addition to its other types. At the beginning of your upkeep, return up to one target card from a graveyard to the battlefield under your control. If it's a creature, it becomes a Zombie in addition to its other types.

card.name: Viego, Ruined King
card.text: When Viego attacks, each opponent loses life equal to the number of creatures you control but don't own. Last hit — Whenever Viego deals lethal damage to another permanent, return that creature to the battlefield under your control with a finality counter on it. (If a creature with a finality counter on it would die, exile it instead.)
